name: Shrimp with Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the ginger, garlic, vinegar, peanut butter, red pepper flakes, and soy sauce. Blend until well mixed and chill. The sauce can be prepared up to 2 days in advance and stored in the refrigerator.
2. In a large saucepan, bring the water to a boil with lemon slices and soy sauce. Add the shrimp, reduce heat to a simmer, and cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until they turn pink. Drain, peel, and devein the shrimp. Chill them until ready to serve. The cooked shrimp can be refrigerated up to 2 to 3 days.
3. To serve, arrange the shrimp on a platter with a bowl of the sauce and toothpicks.
